fixes_applied.fix_description: Added 'restructure' intent to classifyRequest() with regex matching: break into pages, separate pages, split into pages, make multi-page, restructure the site, change page structure, convert to multi-page, want/need separate pages. Supports optional words (break THIS into 4 pages). Added to PLAN_REQUIRED_INTENTS and routed as fall-through to build case in routeToHandler.
fixes_applied.verification_method: Chat message 'Break this into 4 pages — add a separate About page' sent through Studio
fixes_applied.verification_result: Server log shows: [classify] → restructure. Plan card generated with correct restructure plan. Build triggered after approval.

fixes_applied.fix_description: Added extractPagesFromBrief() helper that parses must_have_sections, extracts first word of each section, matches against 22 known page names (about, services, contact, gallery, etc.). Called in approve-brief handler after brief.approved=true. Only runs when spec.pages is empty or has single entry.
fixes_applied.verification_method: Brief submitted requesting 'Home, Gallery, and Contact'. Clicked Build From Brief.
fixes_applied.verification_result: Server log: [approve-brief] Extracted pages from brief: home, gallery, contact. spec.json confirmed: pages: ['home','gallery','contact']. Multi-page build produced all 3 HTML files.

fixes_applied.fix_description: Replaced silent 'if (!plan) return;' with error message: 'Plan not found or already executed. Please try your request again.' sent via ws.send({type:'error'}).
fixes_applied.verification_method: Plan approval via execute-plan WS message with valid planId triggered build. (Silent drop scenario not directly tested in this run but error message code is confirmed present.)
fixes_applied.verification_result: Execute-plan with valid planId successfully triggered full 4-page parallel build.

fixes_applied.gap: brainContext not passed to parallelBuild (pre-existing bug, discovered during testing)
fixes_applied.fix_description: Added brainContext parameter to parallelBuild() function signature and updated the call site in handleChatMessage() to pass it. The template literal inside parallelBuild referenced ${brainContext} but it was never in scope — caused ReferenceError on every multi-page build.
fixes_applied.verification_method: Multi-page build completed without ReferenceError after fix.
fixes_applied.verification_result: 4-page build succeeded: index.html (18719 bytes), gallery.html (17382 bytes), about.html (19937 bytes), contact.html (16102 bytes)

integration_test.brief_submission: pass — classified as new_site, brief generated with gallery/contact sections
integration_test.initial_build: pass — 3 pages built (index, gallery, contact) from auto-populated spec.pages
integration_test.restructure_request: pass — 'Break this into 4 pages' classified as restructure (was layout_update before fix)
integration_test.plan_creation: pass — plan card showed Page Creation, Content Distribution, Navigation, Internal Links
integration_test.plan_approval: pass — execute-plan triggered parallel build with template + 4 pages
integration_test.nav_working: pass — page tabs show home, contact, gallery, about; template applied to all 4 pages

new_test_descriptions: classifies restructure intent (12 positive cases including 'break this into 4 pages')
does not classify layout changes as restructure (2 negative cases)
extractPagesFromBrief: extracts known page names from sections

remaining_gaps: Regex iteration needed: first version of restructure regex didn't match 'break THIS into 4 pages' — fixed by adding optional word groups. May need more real-world testing for edge phrases.

extractPagesFromBrief uses first-word heuristic — 'hero banner' extracts 'hero' which is not in KNOWN_PAGES (correct), but 'about us section' extracts 'about' (correct). Edge case: 'portfolio showcase' extracts 'portfolio' (correct). All tested.
